overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle weaves between neon-lit glass skyscrapers, cruises above busy highways, and maneuvers through tight urban canyons with cyberpunk signage and futuristic architecture visible throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban canyon between neon-lit glass skyscrapers

events.description: large digital billboard on left temporarily obstructs view
vehicle banks sharply left around building corner while descending

agents.ego_description: maneuvering flying vehicle through narrow airspace between glass towers at low speed, navigating tight turns

notable_agents.action: distant flying car visible ahead in the canyon

tall glass commercial building with geometric facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a narrow canyon between towering glass skyscrapers in Night City. Neon signage including a prominent 'Hawkins' sign illuminates the corridor. The camera banks sharply around corners as the vehicle maneuvers through the tight urban airspace at low speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated airspace above multi-lane highway intersection

events.description: exits narrow building canyon into open airspace above highway
vehicle accelerates and ascends to cruising altitude above traffic

agents.ego_description: ascending and accelerating to high-speed cruise above busy highway traffic

entered.detail: busy six-lane highway with multiple levels and ramps visible below
concrete highway overpass structure crossing above the main road
distant modern glass skyscraper on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Breaking free from the enclosed canyon, the vehicle ascends into open airspace above a busy multi-lane highway. The view opens up to reveal the sprawling cityscape below, with traffic moving along the roads and distant glass towers visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: descent through covered urban infrastructure toward street level

events.description: vehicle descends rapidly and executes sharp right bank through tight corridor
passes under concrete overpass structure with political campaign posters

agents.ego_description: descending and navigating sharp turns through covered urban passages and underpasses

entered.detail: gray concrete highway overpass with structural supports
bridge structure covered with 'VOTE' campaign posters and political advertisements
dark metal and concrete industrial building with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from cruising altitude into a tighter urban environment, navigating through covered corridors and under concrete overpasses. Political 'VOTE' posters line the left side as the vehicle banks sharply through the confined airspace between industrial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through commercial district with open skyline views

events.description: emerges from covered underpass onto open elevated highway
vehicle accelerates along straightaway reaching maximum speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway with open city views and distant skyline visible

entered.detail: metal guardrail along the edge of the elevated roadway
panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings on the horizon
cluster of contemporary glass and steel high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the vehicle accelerates along an open elevated highway with expansive views of the distant city skyline. Modern glass office towers rise on the horizon as the vehicle speeds along the curved roadway, concluding the journey through the futuristic metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight path that transitions from the claustrophobic depths of neon-lit urban canyons to the expansive vistas of a futuristic skyline. It begins by weaving through a narrow corridor of towering glass skyscrapers, banking sharply past glowing neon signs like the prominent Hawkins display. As the vehicle breaks free from the enclosed space, the camera ascends into open airspace to reveal a sprawling cityscape and a busy multi-lane highway stretching toward the horizon. The scene then shifts as the vehicle descends back into a confined environment, gliding under concrete overpasses and past political posters lining industrial buildings. Finally, the camera emerges from these covered passages and accelerates along a curved elevated highway, opening up to a wide view of modern glass office towers under the city sky.
